# Ahinsa The Grand Green Valley — Image Slot

**Project URL:** `/projects/grand-green-valley`
**Location:** Fatehabad Road, near Dauki / Kundol, Agra, UP
**Type:** Premium Residential Apartments

Drop the following files in this folder. Once added, update the URLs in
`src/data/site.js` &rarr; `PROJECT_DETAILS.grand-green-valley` to point to
`/images/projects/grand-green-valley/<filename>`.

## Required Images

- `hero.jpg`        — Full-screen hero banner (1920 x 1080)
- `card.jpg`        — Listing thumbnail (1200 x 900)
- `overview.jpg`    — About-section side image (1200 x 1500)
- `gallery-1.jpg`   — Exterior elevation
- `gallery-2.jpg`   — Lobby / entrance
- `gallery-3.jpg`   — Living room interior
- `gallery-4.jpg`   — Bedroom interior
- `gallery-5.jpg`   — Amenity (pool / gym / clubhouse)
- `gallery-6.jpg`   — Aerial / landscape view

## Optional Images

- `master-plan.jpg`  — Site / master plan
- `floorplan-1.jpg`  — 2 BHK unit plan
- `floorplan-2.jpg`  — 3 BHK unit plan
- `location-map.jpg` — Location & connectivity map
- `logo.png`         — Project sub-brand logo if any
